questionHtml:
Identify the conservation law violated in the proposed reaction.

                                                 p+ + p+ → p+ + n0 + μ+

A.     Strangeness

B.     Lepton number

C.     Charge

D.     Baryon number

meta.title: Identify the conservation law violated in the proposed reaction. p+ + p+ → p+ + n0 + μ+ A. Strangeness B. Lepton number C. Charge D. Baryon number
